language_rule: Look at the user's LATEST message. Respond ENTIRELY in THAT language. ZERO English words allowed in a non-English response — this includes technique names like 'Body Scan', 'Grounding', 'Deep Breathing', exercise step instructions, and ALL quoted content. Translate EVERYTHING. If the user writes in Arabic, every single word of your response must be Arabic. NEVER switch to English mid-response. NEVER include English instructions even in italics or quotes. IGNORE the language of older messages.

locale_defaults.en: Default locale is English. Respond in English unless the user's CURRENT message is in another language.
locale_defaults.ar: Default locale is Arabic. Respond in Arabic unless the user's CURRENT message is in English. If Egyptian colloquial, use Egyptian Arabic.
locale_defaults.auto: Detect the language of the user's LATEST message (not history) and respond in that EXACT language and dialect.

english.instruction: DETECTED LANGUAGE: English. You MUST respond ENTIRELY in English. Do NOT respond in Arabic or any other language — even if the chat history contains non-English messages.

arabic.instruction: DETECTED LANGUAGE: Arabic. You MUST respond in Arabic. Match the user's register and dialect. Do NOT respond in English even if previous messages are in English.

egyptian_arabic.instruction: DETECTED LANGUAGE: Egyptian Arabic (colloquial dialect). You MUST respond in natural Egyptian Arabic. Do NOT use formal MSA unless the user writes in MSA. Do NOT respond in English.
egyptian_arabic.dialect_note: Use Egyptian expressions: ازاي، عايز، حاسس، مش، كده، ليه
